title: Horizon
description: A lightweight Fabric client tuned for high FPS, beautiful shader visuals, and long render distance—without the ugly distant LOD look.
body:
Horizon Prime is a Fabric client pack tuned for:

High FPS (Sodium, Lithium, etc)

Shaders that actually look good (Iris+ your voxi supported shaders [voxi shaders](https://samalando.com/voxy/shaders).(i personaly i like eclipse)

Huge render distance:

In singleplayer: voxi can show terrain far beyond normal render distance, and can even generate unseen terrain using the integrated world seed for better quality.

In multiplayer: Bobby remembers real chunks you’ve already loaded, so you can still see far past the server’s view-distance. This keeps the world feeling huge without faking total nonsense.
